type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Stacks: VOC speciator used to estimate emissions in 2017. US EPA AP-42 emission factor used to estimate emissions in 2018.

Storage: Surmont 2 experienced recurring pressure vacuum relief valve (PVRV) venting at selected tanks starting in May 2017. Full year venting included for 2018 and updated composition available for 2018.

Fugitives: For 2017 reporting, the Levelton CAPP VOC speciator from 2007 was used. For 2018, the updated WSP CAPP VOC speciator from 2018 was used.
